message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor "참가자" as participant1
participant "깃헙 리포지토리" as repo
participant "깃헙 액션" as action
actor "운영자" as operator
participant "파워 오토메이트" as automate
database "데이터베이스" as db

group PR
    participant1 -> repo : PR 생성
    note left of repo : GHA 챌린지 완료 인증샷
    repo -> action : 이벤트 생성
    action -> repo : 라벨 추가: review-required
end

group REVIEW
    operator -> repo : 리뷰
    repo -> repo : 라벨 추가: review-completed
    repo -> repo : 라벨 삭제: review-required
    repo -> repo : 코멘트: /ghasignoff
    repo -> action : 이벤트 생성
    note left of repo : 지정된 사용자만\n이벤트 생성 가능
    action -> automate : 호출
    note right of action : GitHub ID\nPR 본문\n제출시간
    automate -> db : 레코드 조회
    note left of db : GitHub ID

    alt [레코드 있음]
        db -> automate : 레코드 업데이트
        note left of db : PR ID
        automate -> action : 호출
        note left of automate : PR ID
        action -> repo : 라벨 추가: record-updated
        action -> repo : 라벨 추가: completed-gha
        action -> repo : 라벨 삭제: review-completed
        action -> repo : PR 머지
        note right of db : 업데이트 완료
        repo -> participant1 : 확인 이메일
    else [레코드 없음]
        automate -> action : 호출
        note left of automate : PR ID
        action -> repo : 라벨 추가: review-required
        action -> repo : 라벨 삭제: review-completed
        note right of db : 레코드 없음
        repo -> participant1 : 확인 이메일
    end
end

@enduml
```
